summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of fixed AI Policy Copilot authentication and audit trail functionality. All authentication flows, RAG features, and audit logging working correctly.
passed_tests: User registration form properly creates new accounts (test@example.com)
Login authentication works with correct credentials
Main dashboard loads successfully after login with user card display
User information (name: Test User, email: test@example.com, department: Engineering) displays correctly in sidebar
PDF upload functionality accepts sample company_policies.pdf
Document indexing completes successfully (4 chunks indexed)
Index status updates show '4 chunks indexed' and 'LLM Active'
Policy question input field accepts queries
AI response generation works correctly with policy questions
AI provides detailed vacation policy answers with source citations
Source citations expandable section shows document references with relevance scores
Audit Trail page accessible via sidebar button
Audit Trail displays comprehensive activity log with 12+ entries
Audit entries include USER_REGISTERED, USER_LOGIN, DOCUMENT_INDEXED, and POLICY_QUERY actions
All audit entries show correct timestamps, user names, and action details
Back to Chat navigation works from Audit Trail page
Sign Out functionality successfully returns user to login page
Session state management maintains authentication throughout workflow
Premium UI styling and branding render correctly
Streamlit form buttons (regular st.button) work properly - no dual-button issues
